rationale: The cited paper appears only once, in a parenthetical example, to illustrate that conditional independence between variables can arise in a full mediation setup. The citing article does not adopt the cited paper's Bayesian mediation test, Bayes factor procedure, or measurement-error framework in its own SRTM estimation. Its core contribution and empirical analysis are developed around topic-model structure and model-selection machinery independent of that specific mediation method. This makes the citation a conceptual background pointer rather than a meaningful dependency.
